metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_1800
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.5: Myo6 exists in a complex with the AMPAR, AP-2, and SAP97 in rat brain
Fig.6: Sv/sv hippocampal neurons display dysfunctional AMPA-induced AMPAR internalization
Fig.7: Sv/sv hippocampal neurons display dysfunctional insulin-induced AMPAR internalization identical to the disruption of clathrin-mediated endocytosis. Experimental description: M&M:
Sv/wt (Myo6sv/J) mice were purchased from The Jackson Laboratory

For immunohistochemistry 1-yr-old C57/B6J mice (The Jackson Laboratory) were used.

C57/B6J mouse brains or Lewis rat brain regions were homogenised and used for PSD fractionations

IPs were done by extracts made from adult rat brain.
